bird.name: Long-legged thicketbird
bird.summary: The long-legged thicketbird (Cincloramphus rufus) is a small bird endemic to Fiji. The species is sometimes known as the long-legged warble…

relations.subject: Long-legged thicketbird
relations.evidence: The species inhabits old-growth forest in mountainous areas on Viti Levu, usually in habitat adjacent to streams
relations.object_summary: 地形开阔且便于大翼展鸟类活动的山地区域。

relations.subject: Long-legged thicketbird
relations.evidence: The species inhabits old-growth forest in mountainous areas on Viti Levu, usually in habitat adjacent to streams
relations.object_summary: 具备成熟林冠和树洞资源的森林生境。

relations.subject: Long-legged thicketbird
relations.evidence: Threats include some logging and the impact of introduced predators (the small Asian mongoose and the black rat)
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

relations.subject: Long-legged thicketbird
relations.evidence: Threats include some logging and the impact of introduced predators (the small Asian mongoose and the black rat)
relations.object_summary: 岛屿鸟类常受猫、鼬和鼠等外来种影响。
